title: RLFabric
description: RLFabric is a modpack inspired off of RLCraft. With lots of new mechanics, tech, structures, tools, and so much more.
body:
**RLFabric is a survival mod that enhances and makes survival overall harder.**

---
**Loosely inspired off of RLCraft, but for fabric!**

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ba5JSJuc/images/abeeeafff556311b0b40a4fc958fdc8fda490dcc.jpeg)

### Officially out on [Curseforge!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/rlfabric)

### Features
- **Temperature, Thrist, and a realistic body damage system!**
- **Additional structures for you explorers!**
- **Technology!, these damn kids wont get off the radio!**
- **Optimized minecraft!**
- **New armors and tools.**
- **Revamped end + nether!**
- **Sp- Sp- SPACE!?!**
- **The aether! Wait... Isn't that fake?**
- **Included shaders**
- **Better combat + Tree chopping.**
- **QoL + Optimizations.**





# Server host guide
**If you plan on hosting this modpack you must do the following otherwise you'll have a subpar experience.**
- Make sure your server host provider supports simple voice chat setups, parts of this modpack rely on this. (I.e radio communication / regular voice chat)
- Make sure to copy the "config" folder over to your server. If you don't you'll have recipes that overlap / miss other minor modifications made.
  
## Minimum specs 
- At least a 2 vCores
- 4 Gigabytes of ram to avoid slowdowns.

## Recommended specs
- 4 vCores
6 GIgabytes of ram
